name: VISTA GOLD CORP
summary: Vista Gold Corp. is a development-stage gold mining company whose primary asset is the Mt Todd Gold Project in Northern Territory, Australia. The company does not generate cash flows from mining operations. Mt Todd is a large gold deposit with a 30-year mine life, targeting 15,000 tonnes per day processing capacity, with an after-tax NPV of $1.1 billion at $2,500/oz gold.
